channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Judge Halts $110B Paramount-Warner Bros Merger Over Antitrust Concerns
item.description: A U.S. district judge has temporarily paused the $110 billion merger between Paramount Skydance and Warner Bros. Discovery, citing a lawsuit from 12 state attorneys general who argue the deal would ha...

item.title: Kevin Keegan: A Legendary Footballer's Journey and Legacy
item.description: Kevin Keegan, the only British player to win the Ballon d’Or twice, enjoyed a storied career spanning clubs like Liverpool, Newcastle United, and Hamburg. His achievements include leading Liverpool to...

item.title: AP Officer and Partner Found Dead in Kirinyaga County
item.description: A tragic incident shook Kirinyaga county after a police officer and his partner were found dead in their residence. The body of the woman was discovered by fellow officers who went to collect firearms...

item.title: Kano Police Officers Urged to Handle Firearms Responsibly During Training
item.description: Two hundred police constables and corporals who completed an intensive combat and weapons handling course in Kano have been advised to remain battle-ready against criminal elements while upholding pro...

item.title: Andy Burnham appointed UK's seventh prime minister in a decade amid political shifts and international reactions
item.description: Andy Burnham has been appointed as the UK's seventh prime minister in a decade, marking a significant political shift following the resignation of Keir Starmer. In his first speech as prime minister, ...

item.title: Canberra United's ownership change sparks hope for future growth
item.description: Canberra United's future has been secured after the Australian Sports Group (ASG) acquired the club's licence, marking a new chapter for the A-League team. The club's star player, Michelle Heyman, has...

item.title: Emfuleni Accountant's Murder Linked to R16m Fleet Tender Scandal
item.description: Martha Rantsofu, an Emfuleni accountant, was murdered in April 2026 after flagging a controversial R16m vehicle procurement tender. Police confirmed she reported irregularities in the tender, where th...

item.title: Key News Updates: Impeachment Proceedings, China Tensions, and Global Events
item.description: The article highlights several critical developments in the Philippines and globally. The Senate impeachment court has approved subpoenas for Vice President Sara Duterte's financial records, including...

item.title: AAP's Arvind Kejriwal unveils 100-day plan to tackle Delhi's water crisis
item.description: In a bid to address Delhi's worsening water crisis, AAP leader Arvind Kejriwal announced a 100-day action plan during the 2024 election campaign. The plan focuses on improving water supply infrastruct...

item.title: Gatineau Reinstalls Champlain Statue Amid Colonial Legacy Debate
item.description: The City of Gatineau has reinstalled a statue of Samuel de Champlain, a 17th-century French explorer and founder of Quebec City, nearly a decade after its removal for maintenance. The monument, reloca...

item.title: Brad Paisley praises Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's low-key wedding ceremony
item.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding, held at New York's Madison Square Garden, has sparked discussions about its scale and opulence. The couple, who announced their engagement in August 2025, repo...

item.title: Tanzania Insight News Update: July 20, 2026
item.description: The article from Tanzania Insight on July 20, 2026, highlights key developments across various sectors in Tanzania. While the content appears to be a placeholder or template, it underscores the import...

item.title: Experts Highlight Pension Gaps in Nigeria's Informal Economy
item.description: The article discusses how Nigeria's informal economy excludes millions from the formal pension system, according to experts. The informal sector, which employs a significant portion of the population,...

item.title: R’Bonney Gabriel vows to strengthen her fashion career after early 'Project Runway' elimination
item.description: Filipina-American fashion designer and 2022 Miss Universe R’Bonney Gabriel is choosing to view her early elimination from Season 22 of 'Project Runway' as an opportunity for growth instead of a career...

item.title: Federal Judge Blocks $110 Billion Media Merger, Imposes $600M Penalties on Paramount
item.description: A federal judge has blocked Paramount Skydance's $110 billion bid to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery and CNN, imposing potential penalties exceeding $600 million. The decision, issued by U.S. District ...

item.title: CRDB Bank Supports Youth Development in Tanzania
item.description: The article highlights CRDB Bank's collaboration with Mwana FA to nurture youth talents in Tanzania. The initiative aims to provide young people with opportunities to develop their skills and contribu...

item.title: Kenya Law Society Announces Boycott of Judges Over Integrity Concerns
item.description: The Law Society of Kenya (LSK) has released a list of judges and judicial officers targeted for a boycott by advocates, starting July 23, 2026. The move comes after months of failed negotiations with ...

item.title: Andy Burnham outlines plans to address social care and homelessness as new PM
item.description: Andy Burnham, the newly appointed UK prime minister, has outlined his priorities for addressing long-standing social challenges, including the crisis in social care and homelessness. In his first majo...

item.title: Andy Burnham Appointed U.K. Prime Minister After Starmer Resignation
item.description: Andy Burnham has been appointed as the new Prime Minister of the United Kingdom following the resignation of Keir Starmer. The 55-year-old Labour leader secured his position after winning a by-electio...

item.title: Volkswagen Faces Job Cuts as Staff Meetings with CEO Loom
